message:
feat(progress): add file transfer progress with size and speed display

Extends ProgressBar with file transfer tracking capabilities, enabling
download/upload progress visualization with human-readable sizes and
transfer speeds.

New ProgressBar fields:
- total_bytes: Option<u64> - total file size (None for unknown)
- transferred_bytes: u64 - bytes transferred so far
- show_file_size: bool - display current/total size (e.g., "1.5 MB / 10 MB")
- show_transfer_speed: bool - display speed (e.g., "2.3 MB/s")
- use_binary_units: bool - KiB/MiB vs kB/MB

New constructor:
- ProgressBar::for_download(total_bytes) - preconfigured for file transfers
  - Enables file size and speed display
  - Sets total automatically

New update method:
- update_bytes(transferred) - update byte count and recalculate progress

Integration with filesize module:
- Uses decimal() / binary() for size formatting
- Uses decimal_speed() / binary_speed() for transfer rates
- Consistent formatting with rest of library

This enables patterns like:
  let mut bar = ProgressBar::for_download(file_size);
  bar.update_bytes(chunk.len() as u64);
  // Renders: [████████░░░░] 45% │ 4.5 MB / 10 MB │ 2.3 MB/s

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
